The AI Token white paper is prepared under Article 6 of Regulation (EU) 2023/1114 (MiCA) and concerns a utility token providing payments, staking, and governance functionalities within the Gensyn Protocol.The offeror and issuer of the crypto-asset is Gensyn Network Ltd, a British Virgin Islands Business Company, with Gensyn Foundation (Caymand Islands) acting as parent entity responsible for ecosystem governance and treasury management. The white paper is notified to the AMF as the Home Competent Authority.
v3.0 — XBRL compliant — Updated notification under MiCA Regulation with English translation — 16/02/2026

other_whitepapers.wp_comments:
Note that the publication date for the modified white paper is 24.02.2026 at which point this record will be updated with the link.  
•	Technical Alignment for ESMA Register: To update the "Type of Submission" (Item F.5) to "MODI" and ensure all mandatory fields (including the FFG DTI) are updated for integration into the ESMA interim register.
•	Operational Timeline Update: To update the intended starting date of admission to trading to 24 February 2026, aligning with the mandatory 7-working-day notification period.
•	Update on Trading Platform: To formally specify Bitstamp Europe S.A. as the first trading platform where admission to trading is being sought.
